title: dysphania glandulosa
intro: Dysphania glandulosa, also known as red pigweed or curly dock, is a type of annual herb belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural diuretic, astringent, and expectorant. The health benefits of Dysphania glandulosa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Dysphania glandulosa can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
